summary: Completed comprehensive testing of MJV Labs landing page. All backend APIs working perfectly (100% success rate). Frontend displays correctly with all sections, contact form integration working, and mobile responsiveness functional.
passed_tests: Contact form submission (/api/contact) - saves to MongoDB
Hero section loads with split layout and floating UI mock
Navigation links work (Services, Process, Work, Contact)
What We Do horizontal scroll section displays cards
Contact form displays with all fields (name, email, company, message)
Contact form submission works and resets form
Logo and branding visible in navigation and footer
All interactive elements have proper data-testid attributes
Contact form accessible on mobile devices

success_percentage.frontend: 95% (all major features working, minor mobile nav timeout)
